---
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(terra)

data <- read_csv("../receiver-deployments-6-29-2026.csv") %>%
  mutate(dtStart = as_date(dtStart)) %>%
  filter(recvProjectID %in% c(347, 465, 281, 350, 856, 876) &
           deploymentStatus == "active") %>%
  # remove stations from NMGF & TWPD projects that were installed by others
  filter_out(recvDeployID %in% c(11985,
                                 11777,
                                 11741,
                                 11727,
                                 11732,
                                 13124,
                                 12060,
                                 13123,
                                 11667,
                                 13122,
                                 12057,
                                 13121,
                                 11668,
                                 13113)) 

data_vect <- vect(data,
                  crs = "+proj=longlat",
                  geom = c("longitude", "latitude")) %>%
  buffer(width = 15000)
```
<br>
<br>
![](BCRNoSlogan_Horizontal_RGB.png)  

## Motus Station Locations  
#### *as of 6-29-2026*

```{r, echo = F, message = F, out.width = "100%"}

leaflet(data) %>%
 addTiles() %>%
  addPolygons(data = data_vect,
              stroke = FALSE) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(data = data,
             lng = data$longitude, lat = data$latitude,
             radius = 3,
             stroke = FALSE,
             fillOpacity = 1,
             popup = ~paste(sep = "<br/>",
                            data$deploymentName,
                            paste("Installed", paste(month(data$dtStart), day(data$dtStart), year(data$dtStart), sep = "-")))) %>%
  addFullscreenControl()
  


```
